basic_details.job_title: AIIMS Jodhpur Post-Doctoral Fellowship Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online for 38 Posts
basic_details.organization_name: All India Institute of Medical Sciences, Jodhpur (AIIMS Jodhpur)
basic_details.short_information: All India Institute of Medical Sciences, Jodhpur (AIIMS Jodhpur) Post-Doctoral Fellowship Notification 2026 has been released on 02-06-2026 on the official website of AIIMS Jodhpur. A total of 38 vacancies have been announced through the AIIMS Jodhpur Post-Doctoral Fellowship Recruitment 2026.

qualification.education_qualification: MD/DNB in Anaesthesiology, Physical Medicine Rehabilitation, Plastic Surgery, Pathology, Dermatology, Radiology/Radiodiagnosis, General Surgery, General Medicine, Neurosurgery, Obstetrics & Gynecology, Orthopaedics, Pediatrics, Psychiatry, Transfusion Medicine/Immunohematology & Blood Transfusion from an MCI/NMC recognized Institution with 2 year Post PG Teaching Experience (where specified).
qualification.details: Paediatric Anaesthesia: MD/DNB in Anaesthesiology from an MCI/NMC recognized Institution with 2 year Post PG Teaching Experience. Pain & Palliative Care: MD/DNB in Anaesthesiology / Physical Medicine Rehabilitation from an MCI/NMC recognized Institution with 2 year Post PG Teaching Experience. Reconstructive and Microsurgery: M.Ch/DNB in Plastic Surgery from an MCI/NMC recognized Institution. Clinical Dermatopathology: MD/DNB in Pathology /Dermatology from an MCI / NMC recognized Institution with 2 year Post PG Teaching Experience. Abdominal Radiology, Cardiovascular and Thoracic Radiology, Neuroradiology, Paediatric Radiology, Women's Imaging: MD/DNB in Radiology/Radiodiagnosis from an MCI/NMC recognized Institution with 2 year Post PG Teaching Experience. Minimal Access Surgery: MS/DNB in General Surgery from an MCI/NMC recognized Institution with 2 year Post PG Teaching Experience. Clinical Hematology: MD/DNB in General Medicine from an MCI/NMC recognized Institution with 2 year Post PG Teaching Experience. Cranio-Vertebral Junction and Spine Neurosurgery: M.Ch/DNB in Neurosurgery from an MCI/NMC recognized Institution. Fetal Medicine, Minimally Invasive Gynecology, Reproductive Medicine: MD/MS/DNB in Obstetrics & Gynecology from an MCI/NMC recognized Institution with 2 year Post PG Teaching Experience. Spine Surgery, Adult Joint Reconstruction, Sports Injuries and Arthroscopy: MS/DNB in Orthopaedics from an MCI/NMC recognized Institution with 2 year Post PG Teaching Experience. Paediatric Nephrology, Paediatric Endocrinology & Diabetes, Paediatric Clinical Hematology: MD/DNB in Pediatrics from an MCI/NMC recognized Institution with 2 year Post PG Teaching Experience. Cytopathology, Renal Pathology, Clinical Dermatopathology: MD/DNB in Pathology from an MCI/NMC recognized Institution with 2 year Post PG Teaching Experience. Consultation-Liaison Psychiatry, Child & Adolescent Psychiatry: MD/DNB in Psychiatry from an MCI/NMC recognized Institution with 2 year Post PG Teaching Experience. Apheresis Technology & Blood Component Therapy: MD/DNB in Transfusion Medicine/Immunohematology & Blood Transfusion/ Pathology from an MCI/NMC recognized Institution with 2 year Post PG Teaching Experience.

selection_process: Written Exam (MCQs based) Interview Document Verification
how_to_apply: Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria can apply online for the AIIMS Jodhpur Various Posts Recruitment 2026.
Applications must be submitted online on or before 30-06-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of AIIMS Jodhpur to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

all_official_links.label: Download AIIMS Jodhpur Job 2026 Notification PDF

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the AIIMS Jodhpur Post-Doctoral Fellowship?
faq.answer: The last date to apply online for the AIIMS Jodhpur Post-Doctoral Fellowship positions is 30th June 2026. Candidates are advised to submit their applications well before this deadline.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available for the Post-Doctoral Fellowship at AIIMS Jodhpur?
faq.answer: There are a total of 38 vacancies for the Post-Doctoral Fellowship posts announced by AIIMS Jodhpur in this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q3. What is the application fee for the AIIMS Jodhpur recruitment?
faq.answer: The application fee for General/OBC candidates is ₹ 1,000/- plus transaction charges, and for SC/ST candidates, it is ₹ 800/- plus transaction charges. Persons with Benchmark Disabilities (PwBD) are exempted from the fee.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for the Post-Doctoral Fellowship positions?
faq.answer: The selected candidates will receive a salary of Rs. 67,700/- per month, along with NPA and other usual allowances as per Level – 11.

faq.question: Q5. What is the mode of application for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The application process for the AIIMS Jodhpur Post-Doctoral Fellowship recruitment is entirely online. Candidates need to visit the official website to fill out and submit their applications.

faq.question: Q6. What is the educational qualification required for these fellowships?
faq.answer: The educational qualifications vary depending on the specific fellowship. Generally, candidates need to have an MD/DNB or M.Ch/DNB in a relevant medical specialty from an MCI/NMC recognized institution, often with 2 years of post-PG teaching experience.

faq.question: Q7. Is there an age limit for applying to these fellowships?
faq.answer: The provided data does not specify an age limit for these Post-Doctoral Fellowship positions. Candidates are advised to check the official notification for any age-related criteria.

faq.question: Q8. What is the selection process for the AIIMS Jodhpur Post-Doctoral Fellowship?
faq.answer: The selection process typically involves a Written Exam (MCQs based), followed by an Interview, and finally Document Verification for the shortlisted candidates.

faq.question: Q9. Where can I find the official notification PDF?
faq.answer: The official notification PDF can be accessed through the "Important Links" section of this article, where a direct link is provided for download.

faq.question: Q10. What is the official website of AIIMS Jodhpur?
faq.answer: The official website of All India Institute of Medical Sciences, Jodhpur is www.aiimsjodhpur.edu.in. You can visit this site for more information and updates.

faq.question: What is the last date to apply for the AIIMS Jodhpur Post-Doctoral Fellowship?
faq.answer: The last date to apply online for the AIIMS Jodhpur Post-Doctoral Fellowship positions is 30th June 2026. Candidates are advised to submit their applications well before this deadline.
